name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Interface Component Registry

components.component_purpose: Display artifact-subject boundary and chamber framing.
components.forbidden_future_role: Detector disclaimer only, upload terms banner.
components.copy_boundary: Must use boundary and posture language only.
components.conceptual_identity_role: makes the chamber boundary visible before reasoning
components.hoax_specific_behavior: frames workbench as governed evidence posture space
components.generic_detector_pattern_blocked: scanner disclaimer, try free banner, upload terms
components.non_authorization_statement: This component does not authorize interface, prototype, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public routes.

components.component_purpose: Display artifact description and type under artifact-first framing.

components.component_purpose: Visualize provenance shadow and missing chain elements.

components.component_purpose: List information gaps as uncertainty register entries.
